# GZIP(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  gzip — compress or decompress files

## SYNOPSIS
  gzip [-d] <file>

## DESCRIPTION
Compresses files using gzip algorithm. Use -d to decompress.

## OPTIONS
  -d  decompress (same as gunzip)
  -v  verbose output
  -k  keep original file

## EXAMPLES
  gzip evidence.log
  gzip -d evidence.log.gz
  gunzip evidence.log.gz

## SEE ALSO
  gunzip, zip, tar
